asset.title: L5 Large Range
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the 5-row window loading, locking, reading, writing, and versioning sequence in a simplified UI simulation.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the step-by-step process of targeting, locking, and updating a specific row within a limited window.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Covers the full sequence from initial state to lock, read, write, and final lock release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed layout with clear step indicators, though highly simplified.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet cell versioning and agent coordination theme.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Functions well as a conceptual workflow preview, though it is a simplified simulation.

legibility.evidence: Text and status indicators are readable, though contrast on some labels is low.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Relevant for developers understanding concurrency and range-locking mechanisms.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents a simulated step-by-step protocol flow without claiming to be a live complex UI.

observedEvidence: Value update to +8.2% and version increment to V2
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Step-by-step simulation of the L5 large range protocol, demonstrating row-level locking, reading, and versioned writing within a 5-row window.
